general.pageSubtitle: Manage your project information and danger zone
general.nonOwnerNotice: Only the project owner can manage advanced settings. Contact the owner if you need to make changes.

info.title: Project Information
info.subtitle: Basic details about this project
info.name: Project Name
info.nameHelper: Project name cannot be changed at this time.
info.idHelper: Use this ID when integrating with our API.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.subtitle: Irreversible and destructive actions
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this project and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Delete project?
deleteDialog.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
deleteDialog.warning: You are about to permanently delete <bold>{name}</bold>. The following data will be lost:

waba.pageSubtitle: Connect and manage your WhatsApp Business accounts
waba.loadError: Failed to load WhatsApp connection status. Please try again.

empty.title: Connect WhatsApp Business
empty.subtitle: Link your WhatsApp Business Account to start sending OTPs and notifications to your users through Meta's official API.

features.official: Official Meta WhatsApp Cloud API integration
features.multiNumber: Multiple phone numbers per business account

empty.connectError: Couldn't start the connection flow. Please try again.
empty.helperNote: You'll be redirected to Meta to authorize the connection. Make sure you have a verified WhatsApp Business Account.

connected.title: Connected Accounts
connected.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No accounts connected} =1 {# account connected} other {# accounts connected}}

account.noPhoneNumbers: No phone numbers found for this account.

nextSteps.title: Next Steps
nextSteps.description: After connecting your WhatsApp account, you'll need to create approved message templates before you can send OTPs.

docs.title: Need Help?
docs.description: Check our integration guide for step-by-step instructions on setting up your WhatsApp Business account with Meta.

templates.pageSubtitle: Create and manage WhatsApp message templates for sending OTPs
templates.loadError: Failed to load templates. Please try again.

noWaba.title: Connect WhatsApp first
noWaba.description: Before you can create message templates, you need to connect a WhatsApp Business account to this project.

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.description: Create your first message template to start sending OTPs and notifications through WhatsApp.

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.emptyHint: Your message will appear here as you type
preview.variableHint: Variables like {'{{1}}'} will be replaced with real values when the message is sent.

createDialog.title: Create new template
createDialog.subtitle: Choose a starting point
createDialog.builderSubtitle: Customize the content and submit for Meta review
createDialog.submitInfo: Once submitted, Meta usually reviews templates within a few hours.
createDialog.submitSuccess: Template "{name}" submitted to Meta for review
createDialog.submitError: Failed to submit template. Please check the content and try again.
createDialog.variableCount: {count, plural, =1 {1 variable used} other {# variables used}}

otp_basic.title: Basic OTP
otp_basic.description: Simple verification code message with sender code as text. Best for most OTP use cases.

otp_with_button.title: OTP with Copy Button
otp_with_button.description: Verification code with a one-tap copy button. Recommended for the best user experience.

blank.title: Start from scratch
blank.description: Build a custom template with full control over every component.

fields.name: Template name
fields.nameHelper: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only (e.g. auth_otp_basic). Cannot be changed later.
fields.headerHelper: Optional. Bold text at the top of the message (max 60 chars).
fields.bodyHelper: The main message content. Use {'{{1}}'}, {'{{2}}'} for variables (max 1024 chars).
fields.bodyPlaceholder: Your verification code is {{1}}. Do not share this code with anyone.
fields.footerHelper: Optional. Small disclaimer text below the message (max 60 chars).
fields.copyCodeHelper: Adds a one-tap button that copies the OTP code. Highly recommended for AUTH templates.

deleteDialog.title: Delete template?
deleteDialog.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
deleteDialog.warning: You are about to permanently delete <bold>{name}</bold>. This will remove it from both your dashboard and Meta. Any code using this template will stop working.
deleteDialog.error: Failed to delete template. Please try again.
